I'm also preparing to add a new step within the onboarding flow to properly display these newly-added fields. I will also incorporate the deductions search bar to filter employee records.

My immediate task involves the "Preview" step in the onboarding process, specifically designing the `Preview` component and its integration within the overall application flow.
